title: claytonia grayi
intro: Claytonia grayi, also known as Gray's miner's lettuce, is a perennial plant belonging to the purslane family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its high levels of vitamins A, C, and E, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Claytonia grayi can be made into teas, salves, and infusions, and it is often used as a nutritional supplement in the form of capsules or powders.
